name: Postback / Webhook
method: POST (push from Flattrade to your endpoint)
summary: Describes the order-update postback (webhook) that Flattrade pushes to your configured endpoint: you receive order updates for orders placed through the API. Each update is delivered as a JSON payload describing the current state/event of the order (new, fill, rejected, cancelled, etc.), including a SHA256 checksum so you can verify the message is genuinely from Flattrade and not a third party.

response_fields.name: norenordno
response_fields.description: Noren Order Number

response_fields.name: uid
response_fields.description: User Id

response_fields.name: actid
response_fields.description: Account ID

response_fields.name: exch
response_fields.description: Exchange

response_fields.name: tsym
response_fields.description: Trading symbol

response_fields.name: qty*
response_fields.description: Order Quantity [If qty is junk value other than numbers]. (required field)

response_fields.name: prc*
response_fields.description: Order Price [If prc is junk value other than numbers] "Order price cannot be zero". (required field)

response_fields.name: prd
response_fields.description: Product

response_fields.name: status
response_fields.description: Order status (New, Replaced, Complete, Rejected etc)

response_fields.name: reporttype
response_fields.description: Order event for which this message is sent out. (Fill, Rejected, Canceled)

response_fields.name: trantype*
response_fields.description: B -> BUY, S -> SELL [transtype should be 'B' or 'S' else reject]. (required field)

response_fields.name: prctyp
response_fields.description: Order price type (LMT, SL-LMT)

response_fields.name: ret*
response_fields.description: Order Retention type [ret should be DAY / EOS / IOC else reject]. (required field)

response_fields.name: fillshares
response_fields.description: Total Filled shares for this order

response_fields.name: avgprc
response_fields.description: Average fill price

response_fields.name: fltm
response_fields.description: Fill Time (present only when reporttype is Fill)

response_fields.name: flid
response_fields.description: Fill ID (present only when reporttype is Fill)

response_fields.name: flqty
response_fields.description: Fill Qty (present only when reporttype is Fill)

response_fields.name: flprc
response_fields.description: Fill Price (present only when reporttype is Fill)

response_fields.name: rejreason
response_fields.description: Order rejection reason, if rejected

response_fields.name: exchordid
response_fields.description: Exchange Order ID

response_fields.name: cancelqty
response_fields.description: Canceled quantity, in case of canceled order

response_fields.name: remarks
response_fields.description: User added tag, while placing order

response_fields.name: dscqty*
response_fields.description: Disclosed quantity [If dscqty is junk value other than numbers]. (required field)

response_fields.name: trgprc
response_fields.description: Trigger price for SL orders

response_fields.name: snonum
response_fields.description: This will be present for child orders in case of cover and bracket orders, if present needs to be sent during exit

response_fields.name: snoordt
response_fields.description: This will be present for child orders in case of cover and bracket orders, it will indicate whether the order is profit or stoploss

response_fields.name: blprc
response_fields.description: This will be present for cover and bracket parent order. This is the differential stop loss trigger price to be entered.

response_fields.name: bpprc
response_fields.description: This will be present for bracket parent order. This is the differential profit price to be entered.

response_fields.name: trailprc
response_fields.description: This will be present for cover and bracket parent order. This is required if trailing ticks is to be enabled.

response_fields.name: exch_tm
response_fields.description: This will have the exchange update time. Format: dd-mm-YYYY hh:MM:SS

response_fields.name: amo*
response_fields.description: The message "Invalid AMO" will be displayed if the "amo" field is not sent with a "Yes" value. If amo is not required, do not send this field. (required field)

response_fields.name: tm
response_fields.description: TimeStamp

response_fields.name: kidid
response_fields.description: Kid Id

response_fields.name: sno_fillid
response_fields.description: BO Sequence Id

response_fields.name: checksum
response_fields.description: sha256 [ noren_order_num + noren_time_stamp + vendor_key ] CheckSum. (Make sure checksum matches to avoid any third party sending false order updates to your url endpoint)

issues: No explicit failure/error JSON sample is given for the postback (this is a push notification, not a request/response endpoint). The HTTP method and exact URL are not stated in the doc — Flattrade POSTs the JSON payload to the user-registered postback URL endpoint (method/url inferred, not literally printed on the page). Only three fields have a discrete dedicated "Possible value" column cell in the page image: trantype* (B / S), ret* (DAY / EOS / IOC), and amo* (Yes). The draft had additionally populated possible_values for status, reporttype, and prctyp from inline description prose — these were cleared because they have no dedicated Possible-value cell (their enums live only in the Description column).
notes:
- This is an Info section: it documents an inbound webhook/postback, not a callable REST endpoint. Flattrade sends order updates to your endpoint for orders placed through the API.
- The sample payload contains extra fields not in the field table (rorgqty, ipaddr, ordenttm "1672921211" = epoch seconds, token, pcode, rpt "New", ls = lot size, ti = tick size, rprc, norentm "17:50:11 05-01-2023"). ordenttm is a Unix epoch timestamp in seconds.
- Required fields (trailing '*'): qty*, prc*, trantype*, ret*, dscqty*, amo*.
- Validation/reject rules embedded in field descriptions: qty/prc/dscqty must be numeric (junk non-number values are flagged); prc cannot be zero; trantype must be 'B' or 'S' else reject; ret must be DAY/EOS/IOC else reject; amo must be sent with value 'Yes' (omit the field entirely if AMO not required, else "Invalid AMO").
- SECURITY: verify each postback with the checksum = sha256 of (noren_order_num + noren_time_stamp + vendor_key). The doc explicitly warns to confirm the checksum matches to avoid third parties sending false order updates to your URL endpoint.
- Fill-only fields (present only when reporttype is Fill): fltm, flid, flqty, flprc.
- Cover/Bracket order fields: snonum, snoordt (child orders); blprc (differential stop-loss trigger, CO/BO parent), bpprc (differential profit price, BO parent), trailprc (trailing ticks, CO/BO parent). snonum if present must be sent during exit.
- exch_tm format: dd-mm-YYYY hh:MM:SS.
- Only trantype*, ret*, and amo* have a dedicated "Possible value" column cell; status/reporttype/prctyp enums appear only inline in their Description.
- Section spans PDF pages 89-91; page 89 also continues a preceding section's field table (bo2..e_date — NOT part of Postback/Webhook), and page 91 ends where the next section SCRIP MASTER begins.
